zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas II Vinton於1530年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親Jeremy Vinton20歲，母親Anne Engtance Vinton25歲。他於1553年6月16日與Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton在英國英格蘭艾可維林加爾 多結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年在英國英格蘭倫敦阿爾蓋特享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Vinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Finton   with voicing of the initial consonant (see   Fenton  ). In Sussex and Kent the name was probably confused with   Winton  .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas II Vinton was born in 1530, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jeremy Vinton, was 20 and his mother, Anne Engtance Vinton, was 25. He married Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton on 16 June 1553, in Willingale Doe, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1568, in Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas II Vinton est né en 1530, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jeremy Vinton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne Engtance Vinton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton le 16 juin 1553, à Willingale Doe, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1568, à Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

Lui sposato Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton il 16 giugno 1553, nel Willingale Doe, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1568, nel Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas II Vintonが1530年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Jeremy Vintonは20歳，母Anne Engtance Vintonは25歳であった。1553年6月16日にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィリンガル ドでLady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年にイギリスイギリスロンドンアルドガトで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas II Vinton(이)가 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jeremy Vinton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Engtance Vinton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1553년 6월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 윌링일 도에서 Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 알드가트에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton em 16 de junho de 1553, em Willingale Doe, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ro.Willingale Doe, Essex, England, United K: Willingale Doe, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas II Vinton родился в 1530 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jeremy Vinton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Engtance Vinton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Elizabeth Belstead Vinton 16 июня 1553 г. в местности уиллингеил до, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1568 г. в местности алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
